narration: Did you know the Moon pulls on our oceans?
visual_description: Hook visual: Did you know the Moon pulls on our oceans?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Did you know the Moon pulls on our oceans?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Did you know the Moon pulls on our oceans?

narration: Its gravity stretches Earth, creating bulges in the water.
visual_description: Context visual: Its gravity stretches Earth, creating bulges in the water.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Its gravity stretches Earth, creating bulges in the water.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Its gravity stretches Earth, creating bulges in the water.

narration: These bulges mean high tides where the pull is strongest.
visual_description: Escalation visual: These bulges mean high tides where the pull is strongest.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: These bulges mean high tides where the pull is strongest.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: These bulges mean high tides where the pull is strongest.

narration: But there's another bulge on the opposite side of Earth, too.
visual_description: Evidence visual: But there's another bulge on the opposite side of Earth, too.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: But there's another bulge on the opposite side of Earth, too.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: But there's another bulge on the opposite side of Earth, too.

narration: This creates two high tides each day, every day.
